purpose: Test whether an exact native query opens a dense river of party-game tutorials, host skills, cards, scripts, or repeatable series. Semantic resemblance to 局头 is not sufficient.
counting_note: Counts describe only the first visible result set in this session. They are discovery snapshots, not platform-wide statistics. Ads were excluded.

query_runs.assessment: The strongest single role term in this recheck. Exact search surfaced facilitator skills, how-to-become-good lessons, game-organization tutorials, a 14-video activity-game playlist, contests, and a dedicated Người Quản Trò channel. It is broader than youth nightlife, but it genuinely opens a game-facilitation content river.

representative_results.title: Kỹ Năng Sinh Hoạt Quản Trò II Trò Chơi Sinh Hoạt Tổng Hợp
Bài 1 - Tại sao mọi người nên có kĩ năng quản trò
Nghệ Thuật Quản Trò & Bí Quyết Tổ Chức Trò Chơi Hấp Dẫn

query_runs.caution: Not exclusively Gen Z and not exclusively parties; institutional youth groups, camps, buses, Werewolf and stage facilitation are mixed in.

query_runs.assessment: This is the more colloquial drinking-session host/controller label, but exact search mostly returned a family meal host, television-host metaphors and entertainment titles. Only one visible result directly connected the label to opening a music game and drink rounds.

representative_result.title: 'Chủ xị' Giang Ca mở game âm nhạc khiến DatKaa, Phát Hồ liên tục nâng ly

query_runs.decision: Keep as a cultural-role term, but use quản trò—not chủ xị—as the current game-content river mouth.

query_runs.assessment: Dense course/lesson carrier: a freshman seven-minute special lecture, numbered lessons, and a recurring 10-second game series.

representative_results.title: 새내기를 위한 7분 술게임 특강 (새터 가기 전 필수시청)

query_runs.cross_reference: youtube_korea_live_2026-07-16.json records a separate 술게임 게임 설명 run with 10/10 relevant results.

query_runs.assessment: Searching the master/expert framing opens a game river, including an explicit 'become a 술게임 장인' series, uncommon routines, and the 10-second tutorial cluster. The phrase has good yield but is not yet proven as a stable multi-author self-label.

representative_results.title: 술 게임 클라스가 다르다!! 흔하지 않은 역대급 술 자리 술 게임!

query_runs.caution: Keep as candidate until another platform or multiple creators use the exact role phrase. Adult/alcohol labeling is explicit.

query_runs.query: 飲み会 幹事 ゲーム
query_runs.assessment: The role word 幹事 becomes productive when qualified by drinking-party and game anchors. Results included ten-game lists, progress/hosting technique and beginner-safe year-end party games.

representative_results.title: 【幹事必見】飲み会で必ず盛り上がるゲーム10選！！
【幹事必見】絶賛される懇親会＆忘年会進行術！

next_hops: 飲み会 盛り上がるゲーム
query_runs.caution: 幹事 alone is a broad organizer term; the qualified query, not the bare word, is the useful river mouth.

query_runs.assessment: All visible results were party-prep game collections or explainers. Prior TikTok evidence found eight relevant top-grid cards and multiple named-game branches.

representative_results.title: JUEGOS PARA PREVIAS - JUEGOS PARA TOMAR (EXPLICADOS)

query_runs.assessment: The local game umbrella plus host qualifier returned Christmas-party and physical parlor-game demonstrations. A separate logged-in Facebook run found Pinoy parlor games at 4/4 relevant.

representative_results.title: Chrismas Party Pinoy Games | Shoot the Chopstick in the bottle
The best Filipino games to try on your next party!
Hilarious games for your Christmas Party

query_runs.assessment: A narrow but exact college-youth hosting-script entrance. It leads to full scripts and anchoring tips rather than a broad river of game mechanisms.

representative_results.title: Anchoring Script for Freshers Party in College
How To Host Freshers Party at College | FULL ANCHORING SCRIPT

query_runs.caution: Useful for主持流程, but weaker for discovering many distinct games.

query_runs.assessment: A real local game-leading role, but the river is narrow and dominated by caller audio for one bingo-family game.
query_runs.caution: Do not treat it as a general Indian equivalent of 局头.

query_runs.assessment: Weak on this YouTube surface, but the prior TikTok logged-in run was 8/8 relevant. This is a TikTok-native river mouth, not a platform-universal one.
The only visible result was a wedding entertainer compilation. The role word is semantically plausible but does not open the desired youth game river here.
query_runs.replacement_evidence: Prior TikTok run: 8/8 relevant plus three near-exact creator usernames.

query_runs.assessment: Results were television game-show hosts and generic MC training, not a youth party-game river.
query_runs.replacement_seed: เกมวงเหล้า

query_runs.assessment: A literal facilitator phrase produced no visible video results in this surface; it should not be promoted simply because its meaning looks correct.
YouTube interpreted pres as Presidents/President drinking-card games. The UK slang is real, but this exact query is not a clean YouTube river mouth.
Visible results were sports warmups. Prior TikTok evidence found this query strong, so the seed must always be stored with its target platform.
YouTube returned generic Christmas/party games and dropped the local occasion signal. Prior TikTok evidence was 6/8 relevant, so keep this as a TikTok-localized seed only.
The visible results were generic party games; the local context term was not visibly preserved.
One direct local result used MAGANDANG PAKULO SA PARTY; the rest were generic event/party content. Promising local wording, but not yet a dense river.

safety_and_privacy.interactions: No likes, comments, subscriptions, shares, messages, or purchases.
safety_and_privacy.private_data: No cookies, tokens, credentials, private account data, screenshots, or browsing history were stored.
safety_and_privacy.youth_guard: Alcohol-labeled seeds are discovery evidence only. Any product extraction must remove forced drinking, volume/speed goals, humiliation, sexual pressure, and exclusion.
